title: astragalus mokiacensis
intro: Astragalus mokiacensis, also known as Moki's milkvetch or Mokiac's astragalus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. Astragalus mokiacensis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with some herbal preparations also using it in combination with other medicinal plants.
